title: Governance Context
description: The operational ownership and policy context associated with a resource. Governance Context is modeled separately from Resource Identity so operational policy can evolve independently.

owner.description: Team or person responsible for the resource.

managed_by.description: Tool or platform managing the resource.

profile.description: Identifier of the Governance Profile applied to the resource. Independent from the Convention Pack, which is selected via the Naming Request's convention field.
